message:
fix(search): deduplicate main+WAL results and unify NaN score handling

Resolve two bugs in vector search:

1. resolve_sorted_entries now deduplicates by doc_id_hash, preferring
   WAL entries over main-index entries for the same document. A pre-scan
   collects WAL doc_id_hashes so main-index duplicates are suppressed,
   and a seen-set prevents WAL-vs-WAL and main-vs-main duplicates.

2. WAL scan paths no longer skip non-finite scores (`!score.is_finite()`
   guard removed). NaN scores are now handled consistently via score_key()
   which maps NaN to NEG_INFINITY, matching the main scan behaviour.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
